prestazioni: Engine: PSA EP6FDT (1.6L Turbo, 270 HP stock) – Full forged internals upgrade with Manley 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings to handle 400+ HP reliably. Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA turbocharger with TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate and custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe for optimized spool and flow.

Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors paired with a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup and a Syvecs S6Plus standalone ECU for precise fuel mapping. Upgraded high-pressure fuel pump (Bosch CP4.2) and AEM 340lph in-tank pump to support E85 blends.

Suspension & Handling: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 8-position adjustable damping, custom-valved for the DS 4’s 2705mm wheelbase. Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm) and polyurethane bushings (SuperPro) for reduced body roll. AP Racing 6-piston front brake calipers with 355mm two-piece rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads for aggressive stopping power.
estetica: Aero: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (DS 4-specific) with carbon fiber front splitter, side skirts, and rear diffuser. Custom 3D-printed rear wing mounts for a 1.5m wide GT-style wing (Aeroflow Designs) with adjustable angle for downforce tuning.

Exterior: Full Respray in PPG ‘Liquid Black’ with matte clear coat, paired with OEM+ gloss black DS Performance Line badges and custom laser-etched ‘EP6FDT’ engine code decals on the front fenders. HRE FF01 wheels (19x9.5 +30 front, 19x11 +35 rear) in matte bronze with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (255/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear).

Interior: Full Alcantara retrim by Status Racing, including Recaro Pole Position seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses. Custom carbon fiber dashboard overlay with integrated AiM MXS 1.2 data logger and AEM X-Series wideband gauge. DS Performance Line steering wheel wrapped in Nappa leather with red contrast stitching and a quick-release hub (NRG Innovations).
